articles.title: More Japan data: January retail sales beat and industrial production miss
articles.snippet: Data only, I'll have more to come on this, details and analysis, separately. Added, just a snippet, here: Japan capital CPI slips under BOJ target in policy testJapan January:Retail Sales +1.8% y/yexpected -0.4%, prior -0.9%Industrial Production +2.2% m.mexpected 5.3%, prior -0.1%Manufacturers see: February output -0.5% m/mprior forecast -4.3%March output -2.6% m/m This article was written by Eamonn Sheridan at investinglive.com.

combined_text:
